meta.name: Waterproof ReSet Call Point
meta.description: Waterproof call point with resettable function
meta.heroTitle: IP67 Waterproof Resettable Manual Call Point
meta.heroDescription:
IP67-rated manual call point with resettable operating element that simulates break-glass activation. Visible activation indicator with key reset for immediate re-use.
Available in six colours with three electrical configurations including EN54-11 approved conventional fire model. Multiple label options.
Designed for outdoor and harsh-environment fire alarm systems compatible with most conventional panels.
